commentaries.author: Ambrose of Milan
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh You did walk through the sea with your horses, through the heap of great waters. Ambrose of Milan For the soul at peace swiftly turns and corrects itself, even though it sinned before, and Christ mounts it, rather, and considers it appropriate to guide it. To him it is said, “Mount your horses, and your riding is salvation,” and in another passage, “I have sent your horses into the sea. ” These are the horses of Christ. Therefore Christ mounts his horses; the Word of God mounts pious souls. Isaac, or the Soul.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Thou madest a way in the sea: To deliver thy people from the Egyptian bondage: and thou shalt work the like wonders in the spiritual way, to rescue the children of the church from their enemies.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
